# Abdelhamed Nada

> Portfolio of Abdelhamed Nada — full-stack developer crafting cinematic, production-grade frontends with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Supabase.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, featured work, skills, and process.
- [About](/about): Background, key strengths, technical skills, and education.
- [Projects](/projects): Selected shipped work — public and in production.
- [GitHub Bot case study](/projects/github-bot): Deep dive on the GitHub Bot project.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch for freelance or full-time engagements.

## Writing

- [Building Cinematic Developer Portfolios](/blog/building-cinematic-portfolios): Technical guide on shipping cinematic portfolios with Three.js, Framer Motion, and TanStack Start.
